name: 身份揭露打臉（令牌驗證）
description: 男主展示史塔克家族令牌，所有嘲笑他是流浪漢的人瞬間跪下道歉。觀眾積蓄的屈辱感在這一刻得到釋放——之前越是被嘲笑「流浪漢」，此刻的反轉就越爽。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: This is Stark's feminist token. The Starks never show their faces in public. This token represents that. / This potter has been with the Stark specialties for generations. You can't find it anywhere else. It's the real ring. / Mr. Stark, I'm sorry. Please forgive me.
